items.claim: Alberto Montes has high-level grappling credentials and effective chokes.
items.quote: it's an experienced guy with really great grappling credentials and really good chokes.

items.claim: Tommy McMillan is at significant risk if the fight goes to the ground.
items.quote: I think if he gets Tommy McMillan down, I do think it's going to be danger for Tommy.

items.claim: Chase Hooper is highly susceptible to being finished by a single strike.
Mitch Ramirez lacks high-level skill but possesses significant knockout power.
items.quote: Mitch Ramirez isn't very good, but he does hit hard

items.claim: Biaggio Ali Walsh has no functional grappling or wrestling ability.
items.quote: Bajio Ali Walsh has literally zero grappling and zero wrestling.

items.claim: Gamid Hisv possesses fundamental wrestling and Sambo skills.
items.quote: he's a Dagistani. He knows how to wrestle and he knows what Sombo is.

items.claim: Gamid Hisv has a proven track record of defeating undefeated opponents.
items.quote: his Reeve is I still think, you know, I think he's still green, but he's a Dagistani. He knows how to wrestle and he knows what Sombo is. Wonder what's gonna happen. I mean, his Revivas put together back-to-back victories against five and0 guys in UAE Warriors.
